_comment: Paths listed here are NEVER overwritten by the updater. Relative to project root.
_format: Each entry is a path relative to the SnapSmack root directory. Directories should end with /.
_note_skins: skins/ is intentionally NOT protected. Stock skins ship in every full release zip and must be kept current. Non-stock / boutique skins are never included in the release zip so they are naturally untouched.
_note_fonts: assets/fonts/ is intentionally NOT protected. Fonts are excluded at zip-build time so they never appear in a release zip — protecting them here is redundant.
